summary: The diff implements REQ-1 comprehensively. All specified files (HomePage.tsx, ContactPage.tsx, PricingPage.tsx, CouplesPage.tsx, MenPage.tsx, WomenPage.tsx, AboutPage.tsx, ZurichCouplesLandingPage.tsx, BaselCouplesLandingPage.tsx, SwissOnlineCouplesLandingPage.tsx, Layout.tsx) define CALENDLY_URL as 'https://calendly.com/paarweg-info/paarweg-session-90-min-klon' and use it for all booking CTAs. Calendly inline widgets via CalendlyInlineWidget component also use this URL. No missing requirements or hallucinated features were identified.
